properties.MIP Project Mapping 20260304v2_Project D: Is a 323-kilometre (201 mi), two-to-four lane national secondary road, connecting the provinces of Maguindanao, Sultan Kudarat, Sarangani, and South Cotabato. It starts from Datu Odin Sinsuat in Maguindanao and ends at General Santos in South Cotabato.
properties.MIP Project Mapping 20260304v2_Update:
June 2024
The road widening in Palimbang-General Santos segment was already completed where four lanes are already visible in most parts. DPWH XII is currently packaging a proposal for the widening of the bridges

Jan 2022:
 > P620.169M Approved in FY 2022
properties.MIP Project Mapping 20260304v2_Remarks: Long delayed Mindanao missing links. The project will connect costal town of Sultan Kudarat to Sarangani. Priority project of the DPWH XII.
